name: PickerInputPoint
summary: The PickerInputPoint class represents a pick of one point in a view. Used for values asked by UI.Picker.PickPoint(string Prompt, out Point PickedPoint, out ViewBase PickedView).

constructors.name: PickerInputPoint
constructors.summary: Creates a new PickerInputPoint instance with one point selected in a view.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

properties.name: PickedPoint
properties.summary: The picked point in the view coordinates.

properties.name: PickedView
properties.summary: The view within which the pick occurred.
